chunks.title: Organization of the Priestly Divisions
chunks.reason: Describes the division of Aaron's sons into groups based on David's order and the lot casting.

chunks.title: Assignments of the Priestly Courses
chunks.reason: Lists the twenty-four priestly courses assigned by lot and their purpose.

chunks.title: Genealogy of the Levites
chunks.reason: Details the family lines of the sons of Levi and their subsequent division by lot.
